## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `./gradlew check` in `backend/` when backend code or config changed
- [ ] I ran `pnpm run type-check` and `pnpm run build-only` in `frontend/` when frontend code changed
- [ ] I added or updated tests where behavior changed (or explained why not)
- [ ] I followed existing style and patterns; Checkstyle / lint pass locally
